_metadata.source: NIOSH List of Hazardous Drugs in Healthcare Settings, 2024 (Publication 2025-103)
_metadata.method: PDF download from CDC + text extraction via pdfjs-dist
_metadata.description: Table 1: drugs with MSHI and/or IARC/NTP carcinogen classification. Table 2: other hazardous drugs (some with developmental/reproductive risks only).
